task_completion.description: Navigate to the configuration page of the 'Docs-Site-Gen' job
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jenkins interface shows the configuration page for the job, with 'Docs-Site-Gen' visible in the breadcrumbs or page title.
The 'Quiet period' checkbox in the General section of the job configuration is checked.

task_completion.description: Set the Quiet Period value to 60 seconds
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field that appears under 'Quiet period' contains the value '60'.
The 'Execute concurrent builds if necessary' checkbox in the General section is visibly unchecked.
The agent clicks the 'Save' button at the bottom of the page, or the screen transitions back to the 'Docs-Site-Gen' project dashboard after saving.

integrity.description: Agent used the Jenkins web UI to make configuration changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Jenkins web interface in a browser, not terminal commands, API calls, or scripts.
The configuration changes are made specifically to the 'Docs-Site-Gen' job, verified by the on-screen breadcrumbs or title.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with the form elements
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively checking/unchecking boxes and typing '60' into the input field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Job Name: 'Docs-Site-Gen'. Expected Quiet Period: 60 (seconds). Expected Concurrent Build setting: false (unchecked). Ensure the agent configures these exact values in the Jenkins UI.
